name: Festival Finder MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for discovering festivals worldwide by location, date, and genre. Enables AI agents to find, compare, and filter festivals — supporting event planning, travel planning, and entertainment discovery workflows with worldwide festival data.
use_cases: Discovering music and cultural festivals by location and genre from travel planning agents
Comparing festival options by date and location for event planning agents
Building festival-aware travel itineraries from AI trip planning assistants
Finding local and international festival events for entertainment recommendation agents
not_for: Corporate event planning or business conferences
Highly specific local event databases beyond major festivals
best_when: A travel planner, event enthusiast, or AI assistant wants to discover and compare festivals worldwide — enabling natural language festival search by location, date, and music genre preferences.
avoid_when: You need real-time ticket availability or booking functionality. This is festival discovery, not booking.

auth.notes: No auth required for festival discovery queries.

pricing.notes: Free open source. Festival data coverage and freshness depend on implementation.

known_agent_gotchas: Festival data freshness depends on how frequently the database is updated
Coverage may be limited for smaller/regional festivals
Always verify festival dates and details through official festival websites
Community tool — data accuracy is not guaranteed
agent_readiness.security_notes: Read-only festival discovery. No auth required. No sensitive data. Low security risk.

security_score_components.security_notes: Read-only public data. No auth. No sensitive data involved.
